master.prompt: Create an image for Tellery, a premium interactive storytelling app. The image belongs to the story “O Quarto Escuro”, a brooding photographic-noir murder mystery set in the Estúdio Salgado, a portrait photography studio on Rua Direita in Ouro Preto, Minas Gerais, Brazil, in April 1974 — the morning a renowned photographer is found dead inside his own darkroom on the day of his 25-year career retrospective. Art direction: premium cinematic editorial illustration, semi-realistic digital painting, refined adult noir, moody and atmospheric, 1970s Brazilian period detail, investigative and melancholic. The visual tone should feel like a prestige streaming slow-burn thriller — film photography, oil paints, brass and iron, candlelight and safelight — not a traditional game. Setting identity: Estúdio Salgado is a historic photography studio in a colonial Brazilian mining town — whitewashed adobe walls with baroque trim, heavy wooden doors, darkrooms lit by red safelight lamps, wet chemical trays and apothecary bottles, wooden large-format cameras on brass tripods, leather-bound ledgers, a wall-safe of riveted iron, a portrait studio with painted landscape backdrops, framed black-and-white photographs covering every wall, a small gallery room hung for a retrospective. The town of Ouro Preto is visible through arched colonial windows — terracotta tile roofs, baroque church towers, misty green mountains. Color palette: photographic sepia #8A5A2B, darkroom safelight red #8E2A24, cold-room slate #3A4650, brass-and-iron #7E6238, colonial whitewash #E8E0CE, baroque gold #B8893A, mold-green velvet #4A5840, lamp-amber #C8842E, ink-black shadow #1E1A17. Lighting: dim and atmospheric — red safelight glow inside the darkroom, warm amber desk lamps, long shadows through colonial windows, candlelit interiors, low-key chiaroscuro, subtle film grain, gentle depth falloff. Style: refined, polished, modern, premium, adult, cinematic, semi-realistic, soft depth of field, believable materials, emotionally grounded realism with a photographic-noir undertone. Avoid gore, blood, weapons, police crime-scene aesthetics, modern technology, neon, cartoon style, anime, fantasy RPG visuals, game UI, text overlays, logos, and watermarks.

cover.prompt: Create a wide cinematic cover image for the noir murder mystery story “O Quarto Escuro”. Show the darkroom door of Estúdio Salgado ajar, glowing with red safelight, seen across the dim portrait-studio room — wooden large-format cameras on brass tripods silhouetted in the foreground, framed black-and-white portraits covering the side wall, and through an arched colonial window a glimpse of Ouro Preto's baroque church towers under misty April morning light. The red glow from the darkroom door should be the focal pull, suggesting a secret room where something happened. Composition: wide horizontal hero-card framing for a mobile storytelling app. The darkroom doorway is centered slightly right; on the left, leave atmospheric negative space with deep shadow, a brass-trimmed camera silhouette and hanging photographs for future app title and CTA overlay, but do not render any text overlay. No people. Mood: noir, brooding, secretive, cinematic, period-1970s.

thumbnail.prompt: Create a cinematic close-up thumbnail for the noir murder mystery story “O Quarto Escuro”. Show a wet chemical developing tray on a darkroom bench under red safelight, with a strip of black-and-white film negatives hanging to dry above it and a porcelain coffee cup half-full sitting on the bench beside the tray — the tipped half-empty cup and the hanging negatives must be the clearest focal points and remain readable even at small mobile thumbnail size. A small unlabeled hospital-style glass vial rests almost hidden near the back of the bench as a subtle clue. Composition: square close-up still life, strong focal hierarchy, shallow depth of field, high contrast between red safelight glow and deep shadow. Mood: noir, suspicious, chemical, ominous.

laboratorio.prompt: Create a cinematic location image for the “Quarto escuro”, the crime scene — the photographic darkroom where Otto was found dead. Show a windowless cubicle lit entirely by red safelight, with black-painted shelves, a wet developing bench with three chemical trays, spilled developer liquid pooled across the surface, hanging film strips, a red safelight lamp still on, and a porcelain coffee cup half-full sitting on the bench. The chemical smell is implied by the spilled liquid and the heavy vapor-soft atmosphere. The door in the background is closed and clearly has a heavy interior bolt. Composition: medium-wide shot, the wet spilled bench is the clear focal point, red light saturating everything, deep shadows in the corners. Mood: ominous, claustrophobic, deadly, noir. Important visual clues: spilled developer liquid, three chemical trays, half-full coffee cup, red safelight, bolted door, hanging film strips.

escritorio.prompt: Create a cinematic location image for the “Escritório do estúdio”, where Otto kept the safe and the archive. Show a small ordered office with a leather-topped desk, an old calendar on the wall, a riveted iron wall-safe in the corner standing open and empty with its door swung inward, a bookshelf of leather-bound ledgers, and a reel-to-reel and cassette player on the desk with a cassette tape left in playing position. A folded note sits on the desk. The room smells of leather and old paper. Composition: medium shot, the open empty safe is the dominant focal point, desk and tape player visible. Mood: secretive, ordered, ominous, period-1970s. Important visual clues: open empty iron wall-safe, leather ledgers, cassette player with tape, folded note on desk, old calendar.

estudio.prompt: Create a cinematic location image for the “Sala de retratos”, the main portrait studio of Estúdio Salgado. Show a high-ceilinged room with a painted colonial-Minas landscape backdrop on the wall, large-format wooden cameras on brass tripods, a piano pushed against one wall, framed black-and-white portraits covering another wall, and warm light filtering through tall arched colonial windows. The room should feel like a working 1970s photographic portrait studio frozen on the morning after a tragedy. Composition: wide establishing shot, the painted backdrop and brass-tripod cameras leading the eye. Mood: nostalgic, melancholic, professional, atmospheric. Important visual clues: painted Minas landscape backdrop, wooden large-format cameras, framed portraits, arched colonial windows, piano.

sala_exposicao.prompt: Create a cinematic location image for the “Sala da retrospectiva”, the gallery room where Otto's 25-year career retrospective was mounted the night before. Show a long room with walls covered in framed black-and-white photographs in black frames, champagne glasses still on a serving table, white flowers beginning to wilt, and curtains hastily drawn shut in the morning. The room should feel like the morning after a celebration that ended in death. Composition: wide establishing shot down the long wall of photographs, the untouched champagne glasses as a quiet focal anchor. Mood: melancholic, elegiac, suspended, period-1970s. Important visual clues: wall of framed black-and-white photographs, untouched champagne glasses, wilting white flowers, drawn curtains.

cafeca.prompt: Create a close-up object image for the “Café meio cheio”, the central crime-scene object. Show a white porcelain coffee cup, half-full, sitting on the wet darkroom bench under red safelight, with a dark skin formed on the cold surface of the liquid and a faint unusual sweet sheen barely visible at the rim. A spilled chemical tray and hanging film negatives are softly blurred behind. Composition: close-up still life, the half-full cup dominates the frame, porcelain reflections and red light visible. Mood: noir, pivotal, ominous, intimate. Important visual clues: half-full coffee cup with dark surface skin, faint sweet sheen at the rim, wet darkroom bench, red safelight.

frasco_sedativo.prompt: Create a close-up object image for the “Frasco de sedativo”, the source of the poison. Show a small unlabeled hospital-style glass vial with a metal cap, half-hidden under used developing paper inside a waste bin in the darkroom, with traces of clear liquid still in the bottom of the vial and faint recent fingerprints smudged on the glass. Red safelight glow, blurred chemical trays and waste paper behind. Composition: medium close-up, the hidden vial is the clear focal point, fingerprints readable. Mood: ominous, domestic, quietly deadly, noir. Important visual clues: unlabeled hospital glass vial, traces of liquid, smudged fingerprints, hidden under developing paper in waste bin.

cofre.prompt: Create a close-up object image for the “Cofre do escritório”, the iron wall-safe. Show a heavy riveted iron wall-safe built into the masonry of the office wall, its door swung wide open and inward, the interior completely empty except for a single open steel drawer. No sign of forced entry — the dial and handle are intact, indicating whoever opened it knew the combination. Soft amber desk-lamp light, leather-bound ledgers softly blurred behind. Composition: square close-up, the open empty safe is the absolute focal point, intact dial visible. Mood: ominous, secretive, pivotal. Important visual clues: open empty iron wall-safe, no forced entry, intact combination dial, single open empty steel drawer inside.

roleta_negativos.prompt: Create a close-up object image for the “Roleta de negativos”, the metal negative reel found empty inside the safe. Show a circular metal film reel with its compartments hinged open and completely empty — only the dark empty slots remain, every negative plate stripped out. The reel sits inside the open steel drawer of the wall-safe. Soft amber light, blurred safe interior behind. Composition: square close-up still life, the empty reel dominates the frame, empty slots clearly visible. Mood: damning, pivotal, noir. Important visual clues: circular metal film reel, all compartments empty, empty slots, sits inside safe drawer.

bilhete_ameaca.prompt: Create a close-up object image for the “Bilhete sobre a mesa”, a threatening note left on Otto's desk. Show a small folded note of cream paper on the leather-topped desk, opened to reveal a short handwritten threat in blue ink reading in Portuguese “Pare, ou eu paro você. Não quero o seu dinheiro, quero o silêncio.”, appearing as natural cursive handwriting on paper, not as a digital text overlay. A fountain pen rests beside it. Soft amber desk-lamp light, blurred ledger behind. Composition: square close-up, the note and its handwriting dominate the frame. Mood: threatening, secret, noir. Important visual clues: folded cream note, blue-ink cursive handwriting with the phrase 'Pare, ou eu paro você. Não quero o seu dinheiro, quero o silêncio.', fountain pen.

agenda_otto.prompt: Create a close-up object image for the “Agenda de Otto”, the coded ledger. Show a small black leather-bound diary pulled from the desk drawer, its pages dense with pencil-written columns of initials, dates and monetary values in a tight personal code — no readable names, only ciphered initials and figures, suggesting years of illicit payments. The entries must appear as natural pencil handwriting on aged paper, not as a digital text overlay. Soft amber desk-lamp light, blurred ledger shelf behind. Composition: square close-up, the open agenda and its coded columns dominate the frame. Mood: secretive, damning, period-1970s. Important visual clues: black leather diary, pencil-written columns of initials, dates and values, ciphered bookkeeping.

gravacao_otto.prompt: Create a close-up object image for the “Fita no toca-fitas”, the cassette tape left ready to play. Show a 1970s cassette tape deck on the leather-topped desk, with a single cassette tape already rewound and loaded in playing position, a hand-written paper label stuck to the tape reading in Portuguese “T — cirurgia — 1944”, appearing as natural ink handwriting on a small label, not as a digital text overlay. Soft amber desk-lamp light, blurred wall-safe behind. Composition: square close-up, the loaded cassette deck and its labelled tape are the focal point. Mood: damning, recorded, noir. Important visual clues: 1970s cassette deck, loaded rewound tape, handwritten label reading 'T — cirurgia — 1944'.

recibos.prompt: Create a close-up object image for the “Maço de recibos”, the bundle of payment receipts. Show a stack of typewritten receipts, unsigned, pulled partway out of a cardboard folder in the desk drawer, each showing monetary values and dates over recent months but no payer name — the most recent receipt on top bears the highest value. The receipts should feel like a hidden second set of books. Soft amber desk-lamp light, blurred agenda behind. Composition: square close-up, the stack of typewritten receipts dominates the frame, top receipt's high value visible. Mood: damning, secret, period-1970s. Important visual clues: stack of typewritten unsigned receipts, dates and monetary values, no payer name, cardboard folder.

aurora.prompt: Create a cinematic character portrait for “Dona Aurora”, Otto's wife of thirty years, a White Brazilian woman in her early sixties. She has steel-grey hair in a precise low chignon, fair skin with soft wrinkles, refined gold jewelry, a deep-charcoal elegant mourning dress with a high collar, and a composed, iron-willed expression that conceals thirty years of a broken marriage. She holds a heavy ring of studio keys. Soft amber desk-lamp light, blurred darkroom doorway behind. Composition: 4:5 portrait, head and shoulders, direct composed gaze, dignified and formidable. Mood: iron-willed, dignified, grieving, quietly powerful. Important visual clues: steel-grey chignon, high-collar mourning dress, refined gold jewelry, ring of keys.

helio.prompt: Create a cinematic character portrait for “Hélio Brandão”, the mayor of Ouro Preto, a Pardo (mixed-race) Brazilian man in his early fifties. He has warm tan skin, neatly combed salt-and-pepper hair, a thin moustache, a well-fitted dark grey 1970s suit with a white shirt and a subdued tie, and a charismatic public smile that doesn't quite reach his uneasy eyes. He carries himself like a man perpetually on a podium. Soft amber light, blurred colonial town-hall interior behind. Composition: 4:5 portrait, head and shoulders, slight three-quarter angle, warm but subtly uneasy. Mood: charismatic, political, cornered, public-facing. Important visual clues: dark grey 1970s suit, salt-and-pepper hair, thin moustache, uneasy eyes behind the smile.

madalena.prompt: Create a cinematic character portrait for “Madalena Reis”, the acclaimed stage actress, an Afro-Brazilian woman in her early fifties. She has deep brown skin, natural coily silver-streaked hair pulled back dramatically, large expressive dark eyes, theatrical makeup, a deep-burgundy velvet wrap over a black evening dress, and an expression blending performed grief with genuine theatrical intensity. She holds a folded handkerchief. Soft amber stage-lamp light, blurred velvet theatre curtains behind. Composition: 4:5 portrait, head and shoulders, dramatic direct gaze, theatrical chiaroscuro. Mood: theatrical, passionate, grieving, dramatic. Important visual clues: deep brown skin, silver-streaked coily hair, deep-burgundy velvet wrap, theatrical makeup, handkerchief.

tomas.prompt: Create a cinematic character portrait for “Dr. Tomás Vieira”, the respected surgeon about to be honoured by the Red Cross, a White Brazilian man in his early sixties. He has ruddy fair skin, receding neatly groomed white hair, a trim white-grey beard, wire-rimmed spectacles, a crisp white medical coat over a dark three-piece suit, and a controlled, professorial expression of wounded dignity. He holds a leather medical bag. Soft amber light, blurred clinic interior with a framed medical diploma behind. Composition: 4:5 portrait, head and shoulders, direct composed gaze, low-angle dignity. Mood: controlled, professorial, dignified, secretly cornered. Important visual clues: receding white hair, trim white-grey beard, wire-rimmed spectacles, white coat over suit, leather medical bag, framed diploma.

barbara.prompt: Create a cinematic character portrait for “Irmã Bárbara”, the nun who directs the Santo Antônio Orphanage, an Indigenous-Brazilian woman in her early sixties. She has warm brown skin, deep-set wise eyes, a plain dark-grey-and-white traditional habit with a simple veil, a small wooden cross at her neck, and a practical, weary, no-nonsense expression with a hint of dry humour. She holds a ring of orphanage keys. Soft amber light, blurred convent chapel interior behind. Composition: 4:5 portrait, head and shoulders, soft direct gaze, plain and grounded. Mood: practical, weary, faithful, quietly burdened. Important visual clues: traditional dark-grey-and-white habit, simple veil, wooden cross, warm brown skin, orphanage keys.

vera.prompt: Create a cinematic character portrait for “Vera Salgado”, Otto's niece and studio assistant, a young Parda (mixed-race) Brazilian woman in her late twenties. She has warm light-brown skin, dark curly hair pulled back in a practical loose bun, sharp observant dark eyes, a simple cream blouse under a dark apron, and a quiet, attentive, weary expression of forced loyalty to an uncle she both loved and feared. She holds a strip of developed film negatives. Soft red-tinged darkroom light, blurred chemical trays behind. Composition: 4:5 portrait, head and shoulders, soft direct observant gaze, intimate and tired. Mood: attentive, loyal, weary, quietly trapped. Important visual clues: dark curly hair in practical bun, cream blouse under dark apron, strip of film negatives in hand, red-tinged darkroom light.

full_truth.prompt: Create a cinematic ending image for the full-truth ending “O amigo mais antigo”. Show the darkroom of Estúdio Salgado in the cold light of dawn seen through the now-open door — the red safelight finally switched off, the wet chemical bench, the half-empty coffee cup, and the open empty iron wall-safe visible through the doorway to the office. In the background, the framed photographs on the gallery wall catch the first grey morning light. A folded surgeon's white coat rests on a stool. The mood is tragic, conclusive and elegiac — the crime is solved but the friendship behind it was wasted. Composition: wide cinematic shot, the darkroom doorway as focal axis connecting darkroom, office safe and gallery. Mood: tragic, conclusive, elegiac, grey-dawn, noir. Important visual clues: switched-off safelight, wet bench, half-empty coffee cup, open empty safe through doorway, folded surgeon's coat.

partial_truth_a.prompt: Create a cinematic ending image for the partial-truth ending “A mão certa, o motivo incerto”. Show the half-empty coffee cup on the darkroom bench in uncertain red-and-amber half-light, half in red safelight and half in shadow, symbolizing a truth only half-revealed. Behind it, through the doorway, the cassette tape deck on the office desk is softly blurred and out of reach, the labelled tape still unplayed. Composition: wide cinematic, the half-lit cup as focal point, shadowed unresolved background with the unplayed tape. Mood: unresolved, ominous, melancholy, half-known. Important visual clues: half-lit coffee cup, blurred unplayed cassette tape through doorway, uncertain half-light.

partial_truth_b.prompt: Create a cinematic ending image for the partial-truth ending “O chantagista certo, a mão errada”. Show the open empty iron wall-safe in cold office light, while shadowy out-of-focus silhouettes of the wrong suspects (a mayor in a suit, a nun in a habit, an actress in velvet) stand blurred in the background, none of them the true culprit. The surgeon's white coat lies unnoticed on a chair in the foreground shadow. Composition: wide cinematic, the open empty safe as focal point, blurred wrong-suspect silhouettes behind, hidden surgeon's coat in foreground. Mood: mistaken, ominous, unjust, melancholy. Important visual clues: open empty wall-safe, blurred wrong-suspect silhouettes (mayor, nun, actress), hidden surgeon's white coat in shadow.

wrong_accusation.prompt: Create a cinematic ending image for the wrong-accusation ending “Um negativo que nunca se revela”. Show the darkroom at night, closed and unattended, the red safelight still glowing, the three chemical trays and the half-empty coffee cup untouched in crimson light, with the gallery windows glowing cold and distant in the background. No one is there to claim the truth. The coded agenda lies permanently closed on the office desk through the doorway. Composition: wide cinematic nocturnal shot, the closed darkroom and its red-lit bench as focal point, cold distant gallery glow, closed coded agenda through doorway. Mood: unresolved, eternal, mournful, cold, forgotten. Important visual clues: glowing red safelight, untouched chemical trays, half-empty coffee cup, closed coded agenda on desk, distant cold gallery.
